name: Inflection-1
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (architecture, dataset, and training procedure undisclosed)
note: Pi's original in-house model; GPT-3.5-class personal-AI chatbot tuned for empathetic conversation over coding or reasoning.

results.notes: Average across 57 MMLU tasks; outperformed GPT-3.5, LLaMA, and PaLM-540B per Inflection's technical memo.
8-shot chain-of-thought prompt (Table 8 of the Inflection-1 technical memo); GPT-4 92.0, PaLM-2-L 80.7 shown alongside for context.
0-shot (Table 4 of the technical memo); a 10-shot figure of 85.8 is also reported (Table 5) but 0-shot is used here as the memo's primary comparison setting.
pass@1, 3-shot prompt (Table 9 of the technical memo).
pass@1, 0-shot (Table 9). Memo explicitly notes code generation is the one benchmark where Inflection-1 underperforms GPT-3.5 (48.1).
BIG-Bench Hard with chain-of-thought prompting (Table 6 of the technical memo).
0-shot (Table 7); a 1-shot figure of 83.3 is also reported.

0-shot, unfiltered-web dev split ('Split A', Table 3); this is the figure behind the public blog's claim of a 2.1-point edge over LLaMA-65B (68.2). Three other TriviaQA/split-and-shot variants are also reported (up to 85.0 on the Wikipedia split, 1-shot) but this one was chosen as the standard 0-shot comparison point.

ARC-Challenge, 25-shot, Inflection-1 column of a comparison table (Inflection-2.5 vs Inflection-1 vs GPT-4) on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2.5 launch page. The table is rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/7EntAgSnt8VPh6RRcGzH7kbVRk.svg) with no extractable text layer, so it does not surface via curl/grep or HTML-to-text fetch tools -- confirmed here by directly rendering the SVG asset in a browser and reading the table (HellaSwag 10-shot: Inflection-2.5=90.2/Inflection-1=85.8/GPT-4=95.3; ARC-C 25-shot: Inflection-2.5=94.6/Inflection-1=94.2/GPT-4=96.3, which matches GPT-4's well-known 96.3 ARC-Challenge-25-shot figure from OpenAI's own technical report, corroborating the chart's reliability). A separate, much lower ARC-Challenge(1-shot)=67.0 figure for Inflection-1 also appears on Inflection-2's own launch page (Table 2); the 25-shot figure is used here as it matches the shot-count convention already used for this corpus's other legacy-era ARC-Challenge entries (e.g. GPT-3.5 Turbo, sourced from the GPT-4 technical report's standard 25-shot column).

MATH benchmark, 4-shot, Inflection-1 column of a comparison table on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2.5 launch page (GSM8k/MATH table: GSM8k 8-shot Inflection-2.5=86.3/Inflection-1=62.9[matches this corpus's existing tracked value, confirming reliability]/GPT-4=92.0; MATH 0-shot/4-shot Inflection-2.5=43.1/Inflection-1=16.7/GPT-4=52.9). Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/CqI16dv6DCLT8JgA3o6V2ZTJVQc.svg) with no text layer extractable via standard fetch tools; confirmed by directly rendering the SVG asset in a browser.

PIQA, 0-shot, Inflection-1 column of Table 2 (common-sense/science benchmarks) on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by directly rendering the asset in a browser: full row reads HellaSwag(0)=84.3, HellaSwag(1)=84.4, PIQA(0)=84.2, PIQA(1)=84.4, LAMBADA(1)=83.3, ARC-E(1)=89.6, ARC-C(1)=67.0 for Inflection-1.

ARC-Easy, 1-shot, Inflection-1 column of Table 2 on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Same SVG table as the piqa entry (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by direct browser rendering.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of inflection.ai/inflection-1: page literally states '72.7% on average across all 57 tasks' on MMLU, matching the score exactly. Fetch also confirmed the June 22 2023 announcement date. No changes made.
